🎵 Ordinary — Alex Warren
♥ 🐱
Are you angry
with me?
please be honest with me...
♥ 📚🐱
But I'm reading
your books...
Still mad, Love?
i'm really trying, i promise...
♥ 😔🐱
Still?
Even after I said
I'm trying?
okay i really do deserve this...
♥ 🐶🐱
Look at me.
Puppy eyes.
Just for you. 🥺
i'm not above begging. not even a little bit.
♥ 🌸🐱
Can I say something
really cheesy?
you're the person i always want
to fix things with. every time.
♥ 🎟️🐱
Fine. I made
you a coupon.
🎟 Official Sorry Coupon 🎟

✦ 1 meal — your pick, no complaints
✦ 1 unlimited rant session (I'll listen)
✦ Hugs with no expiry date
✦ I won't argue for a full day*

*unless i'm very hungry. terms apply.
♥ 🔍🐱
Exhibit A:
Things I do
because I love you
✦ Remember your favourite order
✦ Check if you got home safe
✦ Read every book you gave me (slowly, but still)
✦ Think of you randomly and just... smile
✦ Built this whole website for you 🥹
guilty or not guilty?
♥ 🎙️🐱
If I could send
a voice note
right now...
"hey... i know i messed up.
i just really miss you being okay with me.
that's all. 🥺"
♥ 🌷🐱
One last thing.
you deserve someone who tries
every single time without being asked.

i'm that person.
i always will be. 🌸
♥ 🥺🐱
So... we're
okay now? 🥹
just say yes and i'll stop being
the most dramatic person alive.
🎉🌸🎉 🥰🐱
YAYYYY!!! 🎊
She forgave me!!
you're literally the best person ever.
i love you so much it's embarrassing.
thank you for always coming back. 🌸
♥ ♥ ♥
💬 Come on, let's talk 🌸
